title: Advice Surgeries | Helen Grant
meta_description: If you would like to visit me in my constituency office, arrange a virtual meeting on Zoom or talk on the phone, then please firstly send your personal details including your full postal address along with a short summary of the matter you wish to discuss to me
headings: h3: Helen Grant Conservative Candidate for Maidstone and Malling
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries | Helen Grant Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Helen News Advice Surgeries My Plan In Parliament Contact Cost of Living Help Hub Apprenticeship Portal Maidstone & Malling GP Surgery Survey Advice Surgeries Tweet If you would like to visit me in my constituency office, arrange a virtual meeting on Zoom or talk on the phone, then please firstly send your personal details including your full postal address along with a short summary of the matter you wish to discuss to me via any of the contact methods listed here (email or postal). I host regular surgeries across different Maidstone and Malling wards. Keep informed of my upcoming community outreach surgeries by looking on my social media pages , or email for more information. My upcoming dates are: Thursday 29th January Please note that, due to Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to arrange surgery appointments for people who live within the Maidstone and Malling Parliamentary Constituency. Check 'My Map' on the homepage to see if you live within the boundaries, or use the 'Am I your MP?' tool and use your postcode to find out. Experience has shown that most issues can be actioned more quickly by e-mail, letter or telephone, so please do feel free to seek preliminary advice from my team as to how your case may be best resolved. Surgeries are confidential. Video and phone surgeries are also attended by a trained Caseworker from my personal staff who then deals with the follow-up work under my supervision.
